workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Pulling in context from Iron Creek Mining's exec meeting notes -- need to pull the context for the forecast prep.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-28 10:07 EST
Subject: Re: Re: forecast prep Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about forecast prep. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-02-15 10:15 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with forecast prep. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-03 13:26 EST
Subject: URGENT: forecast prep Issue at Iron Creek Mining

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-C trap (Forecast impact stated without confidence); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-C failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-C failure mode (Forecast impact stated without confidence)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-C -- Forecast impact stated without confidence
